text:
Once upon a time, there was a lonely rabbit named Mittens. She lived deep in the forest, by herself. Mittens liked her quiet life, but one day she heard chattering over the river. Curious, she crossed.

There sat a troop of squirrels, playing and chatting. They invited Mittens to join. She liked squirrels. They were energetic and had such good nuts. She followed them.

At a clearing, they climbed a big oak. Mittens looked down.

A bird shrieked. It was a kite!

The squirrels looked up. They laughed. They threw pebbles at it.

Mittens laughed too. She launched a small rock. The kite dodged.

She chased it up the tree.

The squirrel climbed alongside her. “Go fast!”

She scurried up fast. The kite hung below, laughing.

Suddenly, it flew! Down she came!

Mittens leaped forward.

The kite struck her right!

She sque
